div.head: The Secretary of State to the Chargé in Germany (Mayer)
div.p: 67. Your 169, June 4, 2 p.m. You may inform Pfeffer informally that your Government is prepared to send a representative to Germany to discuss the sabotage cases, but that it assumes it is to await an indication from the German Foreign Office that such a visit is desired, as Commission has set hearing for June 17 to determine further procedure. Meanwhile preparations are being made to act immediately upon receipt of such an indication. You should inquire whether Goering will arrange the matter with the Foreign Office or whether he desires that you should make inquiry.
